entities.description: As a subsection of 'Preliminaries' within the BookRAG paper, this section formalizes the research problem of complex document Question Answering (QA) and establishes the foundational context for the proposed approach.
Refers to the specific challenge of answering questions based on complex documents, which is the core research problem being formalized in section 3.1.

relations.description: The concept of 'Complex Document QA' is the primary topic and subject of the problem formulation detailed in section 3.1.
